title: The World Ultimate (JCraft: EOE)
description: Replaces TW skin3 with the appearance of TW in Jorge Joestar (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Replaces TW skin3 with the appearance of TW in Jorge Joestar

Always wanted to make this. It's simple
